name: Synod Bailiff
flavor: Emergency-law enforcer armored in heat-scored plate.

name: Canal Tar Serpent
flavor: A floodline predator that climbs sluice walls like rope.

name: Regent Seat Avatar
flavor: The office itself weaponized into a living command reflex.

name: Mirror Hound
flavor: A pursuit construct trained to sniff witness glass and debt ink.

name: Court Refraction Drake
flavor: Splits into reflected doubles whenever a ruling is contested.

name: Charter Engine Seraph
flavor: Sings legal equations that turn scarcity into doctrine.

name: Tide Canon Penitent
flavor: Bell-veiled pilgrim enforcing mercy through ritual pressure.

name: Obsidian Juror
flavor: Masked adjudicator who prices passage in memory collateral.
